@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "traefik-2299-encrypt-session-sticky-cookie-content",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "traefik: Encrypt Session Sticky cookie content",
+    "description": "Encrypt Session Sticky cookie content. Requested by 47+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current traefik deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your traefik version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nhelm list -n traefik 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working traefik installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review traefik configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant traefik configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get configmap -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=traefik\n```\n### Do you want to request a *feature* or report a *bug*?\nrequest a feature\n\n### What did you do?\nI enabled session sticky under docker.\n\n### What did you expect to see?\n\nThe Traefik session sticky cookie content to be encrypted text."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Encrypt Session Sticky cookie content",
+        "description": "Hi ,\n\nIn your PR on oxy, your changes are breaking due to the changes made on the cookie value.\nCould you add an option in oxy to enable/disable the hashing?\n\nWe would also suggest that adding a consistent hashing load balancing algorithm (#1139) could be a great workaround. If anyone is interested\n```yaml\n<!--\nAdd more configuration information here.\n-->\n\n\n### If applicable, please paste the log output in debug mode (`--debug` switch)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get events -n traefik --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Encrypt Session Sticky cookie content\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi ,\n\nIn your PR on oxy, your changes are breaking due to the changes made on the cookie value.\nCould you add an option in oxy to enable/disable the hashing?\n\nWe would also suggest that adding a consistent hashing load balancing algorithm (#1139) could be a great workaround. If anyone is interested to work on this, we could definitely help :)\n\nThanks!",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "<!--\nAdd more configuration information here.\n-->\n\n\n### If applicable, please paste the log output in debug mode (`--debug` switch)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
